title: Technical Feasibility Report
description: Estimation of time, tech stack, constraints, and technical blockers.

integration_constraints.description: Rate limits, strict API contracts, or hardware constraints.

migration_risks.description: Risks associated with upgrading legacy code or migrating databases.

environment_assumptions.description: Assumed OS, memory availability, or cloud permissions.

compliance_requirements.description: Data privacy laws (GDPR/HIPAA), accessibility standards, or security mandates.

known_unknowns.description: Areas of extreme uncertainty that could derail the timeline.

technical_risks.description: General potential technical blockers or challenges.
